summary: Phase 3 roadmap housekeeping after #127 / PR #142 merge was completed. Issues #129, #128, and #6 were advanced with docs-only design for clip duration, grouped split leakage prevention, dataset mixing/versioning, and the minimal GT passthrough common clip pipeline boundary.
non_blocking_issues: The learning curve and pilot clip dataset commands are draft interfaces because the Phase 3 / Phase 4 CLIs are not implemented yet.
Final adoption of clip duration, torque/domain variation mixing, Brownian/RUN-TUMBLE inclusion, render variation usage, and n_flagella=4 training status remains user decision territory.
adr_reason: Docs-only planning and roadmap housekeeping. No physical model, data format schema, directory architecture, dependency, or testing strategy contract was changed.
next_actions: Implement lightweight Phase 3 window generation and grouped split helpers from docs/phase3/phase3_2_clip_duration_run_count.md.
Connect dataset mixing rules from docs/phase3/phase3_3_dataset_mixing_versioning.md to a Phase 4 dataset freeze checklist.
Start #6 with pseudo GT passthrough metadata generation before real-video detection/tracking.
